more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

In that period, the platform recorded 13,223 WhatsApp inquiries from people [...]

more.description: We were at the Zimbabwe Real Estate and Tech Summit today, and one of the themes that kept coming up is how AI and tech tools are changing the real estate industry. more.title: UK Supreme Court Ruling Weakens Zimbabwe’s Sovereign Immunity Defence in Major Arbitration Case
more.description: LONDON – In a landmark ruling with far-reaching implications for Zimbabwe, the UK Supreme Court has confirmed that sovereign immunity cannot be used as a defence against the enforcement of international arbitration awards under the ICSID Convention. The judgment, delivered on 4 March 2026 in the consolidated case of Kingdom of Spain v Infrastructure Services [...] The post UK Supreme Court Ruling Weakens Zimbabwe’s Sovereign Immunity Defence in Major Arbitration Case appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Brent crude briefly tops $119 per barrel before pulling back, and stocks sink worldwide
more.description: NEW YORK — Oil prices shot up again Thursday because of the war with Iran, tightening their grip on the global economy and sending stock markets worldwide sharply lower. Brent crude, the international standard, briefly rose above $119 per barrel in the morning before pulling back to $112.70, which is still a 5% rise from [...] The post Brent crude briefly tops $119 per barrel before pulling back, and stocks sink worldwide appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Simon Rudland takes on ZBC over claims of bankrolling coup plot
more.description: HARARE – Lawyers for Zimbabwean billionaire Simon Rudland have issued an urgent demand to the Zimbabwe Broadcasting Corporation to retract a “defamatory” article accusing him of financing violent protests aimed at overthrowing President Emmerson Mnangagwa’s government. The ZBC was given two days to retract the article under threat of legal action. Rudland’s lawyer Norman Chimuka [...] The post Simon Rudland takes on ZBC over claims of bankrolling coup plot appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .
